summary: Stopped the high-resource GKE Ollama backend after the option B proof while keeping the service and PVC available for controlled re-enablement.

actions.result: deployment/ollama scaled to 0 replicas in namespace noetl
Helm release noetl revision 130 has ollama.enabled=true and ollama.replicas=0
Merged noetl/ops#76 so replicas=0 is respected instead of being replaced by Helm default 1
Added stop/re-provision runbook to the GKE deployment drift and storage tier audit issue

expected_behavior_while_stopped.travel_provider_ollama: falls back to OpenAI through the existing provider fallback path
expected_behavior_while_stopped.reason: ollama-bridge remains available but the backend pod is intentionally absent

re_enable_summary: helm upgrade noetl automation/helm/noetl --reuse-values --set ollama.enabled=true --set ollama.replicas=1 --set ollama.resources.requests.memory=8Gi --set ollama.resources.limits.memory=10Gi
smoke travel --provider ollama help and travel --provider ollama activities near Times Square
